
### beyond 1-bit predictor  {.smaller}


* devote <i>more space</i> to storing history
* main goal: <em>rare exceptions don't immediately change prediction</em> 
<hr class="vspace" />
* example: branch taken 99% of the time
* 1-bit predictor: wrong about 2% of the time 

   * 1% when branch not taken
   * 1% of taken branches right after branch not taken

* new predictor: wrong about 1% of the time 

   * 1% when branch not taken



### 2-bit saturating counter 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/bpred/texfig/local-saturating-2-bit-saturating-counter.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-saturating-2-bit-saturating-counter.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/local-saturating-2-bit-saturating-counter.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::


### example 

![](/bpred/texfig/local-saturating-example.figure.svg)


### generalizing saturating counters  {.smaller}


* 2-bit counter: ignore one exception to taken/not taken 
<hr class="vspace" />
* 3-bit counter: ignore more exceptions
* <code>000</code>$\;\leftrightarrow\;$<code>001</code>$\;\leftrightarrow\;$<code>010</code>$\;\leftrightarrow\;$<code>011</code>$\;\leftrightarrow\;$<code>100</code>$\;\leftrightarrow\;$<code>101</code>$\;\leftrightarrow\;$<code>110</code>$\;\leftrightarrow\;$<code>111</code>
* <code>000</code>-<code>011</code>: not taken
* <code>100</code>-<code>111</code>: taken
